close_reason: All stalling detection features implemented and verified. Ready for merge from feat/stalling-detection branch.
description:
## Current State (Imperative Context)

**Status:** COMPLETED

**Findings:**
- Feature fully implemented in worktree: `/home/bhd/Documents/Projects/bhd/open-ralph-wiggum-wt-bd-stalling-detection`
- Branch: `feat/stalling-detection`
- All tests passing: 21 tests (10 stalling + 11 existing)
- Verified by @verifier (session: ses_32c37eea3ffeuvTgFBzqO5RDJM)

**File Locations:**
- Primary: `ralph.ts` (lines 864-866, 991-1005, 1709-1875, 2331-2444)
- Tests: `tests/stalling-detection.test.ts` (10 tests)
- Documentation: `STALLING_DETECTION.md`, `VERIFICATION_SUMMARY.md`

**Infrastructure:**
- Tests: `bun test tests/stalling-detection.test.ts`
- CI/CD: Existing GitHub Actions will run tests

---

## Required (Declarative Desired State)

**What MUST be true when done:**
- Ralph detects when agent is stalled (no activity for configurable timeout, default 2 hours)
- Configurable stalling timeout via --stalling-timeout flag (supports human-readable format: 1h, 30m, 2h30m)
- Configurable blacklist duration via --blacklist-duration flag (default 8 hours)
- Two actions available: stop (default) or rotate
- Stop action: terminates loop when stalling detected
- Rotate action: switches to next agent in rotation and blacklists current agent
- Blacklist persisted in state file (.ralph/ralph-loop.state.json)
- Blacklist expires after configured duration
- Stalling detection works in both streaming and non-streaming modes
- Heartbeat messages show "⏳ working... elapsed X · last activity Y ago"
- Comprehensive test coverage with real process spawning

**File Structure:**
- `ralph.ts` - Main implementation with stalling detection logic
- `tests/stalling-detection.test.ts` - Test suite
- `STALLING_DETECTION.md` - User documentation

---

## Acceptance Criteria (Declarative)

- [x] Stalling timeout is configurable (default 2 hours)
- [x] Blacklist duration is configurable (default 8 hours)
- [x] --stalling-action flag supports "stop" and "rotate"
- [x] Stop action terminates loop when stalling detected
- [x] Rotate action switches to next agent and blacklists current
- [x] Blacklist persisted in state file
- [x] Blacklist expires after configured duration
- [x] Stalling detection works in streaming mode
- [x] Stalling detection works in non-streaming mode (--no-stream)
- [x] Heartbeat shows elapsed time and last activity time
- [x] Tests spawn real ralph processes
- [x] Tests use commands that stall (sleep)
- [x] Tests verify early exit when stalling detected
- [x] All tests pass (21/21)

**Verification Commands:**
```bash
# Run all tests
cd /home/bhd/Documents/Projects/bhd/open-ralph-wiggum-wt-bd-stalling-detection
bun test

# Run stalling detection tests specifically
bun test tests/stalling-detection.test.ts

# Test stop action with short timeout
bun run ralph.ts "sleep 10" --stalling-timeout 2s --stalling-action stop --max-iterations 1

# Test rotate action
bun run ralph.ts "sleep 10" --rotation "opencode:claude-sonnet-4,claude-code:gpt-4o" --stalling-action rotate --stalling-timeout 2s --blacklist-duration 10s --max-iterations 2
```

---

## DOD Items

**Requirements:**
- Detect stalling based on "last activity" time
- Configurable timeout (default 2 hours)
- Stop or rotate actions
- Blacklist for configurable duration (default 8 hours)
- Works in both streaming and non-streaming modes

---

## Open Questions (Imperative Context)

**Blockers:** None - feature complete

**Decisions Made:**
- Use milliseconds internally, parse human-readable format (1h, 30m, etc.)
- Blacklist stored in state file for persistence across restarts
- Clear all blacklists if all agents are blacklisted (prevent deadlock)
- Stalling detection in non-streaming mode uses timer-based approach

---

## Foundation (Imperative Context)

**Completed:**
- Heartbeat system already existed in streaming mode
- State persistence infrastructure already in place
- Agent rotation system already implemented
- Test infrastructure using Bun.spawn

**References:**
- Heartbeat implementation: `ralph.ts:1709-1875`
- State persistence: `ralph.ts:1124-1164`
- Agent rotation: `ralph.ts:2210-2249`
- Existing tests: `tests/sigint-cleanup.test.ts`, `tests/ralph.test.ts`
title: Stalling Detection with Configurable Timeout and Agent Rotation

close_reason: Streaming mode stalling detection implemented and tested. All tests passing.
description:
## Implementation Details

**File:** `ralph.ts` (lines 1709-1875)

**What was implemented:**
- Track `lastActivityAt` timestamp on each output line
- Heartbeat timer checks inactivity: `now - lastActivityAt >= stallingTimeoutMs`
- Kill process when stalled
- Record stalling event to history
- Trigger configured action (stop or rotate)

**Verification:**
- Test: `tests/stalling-detection.test.ts` - "detects stalling in streaming mode"
- Command: `bun run ralph.ts "sleep 10" --stalling-timeout 2s --stalling-action stop`

**Status:** COMPLETED
title: Implement stalling detection in streaming mode

close_reason: Non-streaming mode bug fixed. Timer-based stalling detection added. Tests passing.
description:
## Bug Description

**Original Issue:** Stalling detection only worked in streaming mode. When `--no-stream` flag was used, there was no heartbeat and no stalling check (ralph.ts:2364-2369).

**Fix Implemented:**
- Added timer-based stalling detection for non-streaming mode (ralph.ts:2365-2384)
- Timer checks process runtime against stallingTimeoutMs
- Kills process when stalled
- Same action handling (stop/rotate) as streaming mode
- Records stalling events to history

**Verification:**
- Test: `tests/stalling-detection.test.ts` - "detects stalling in non-streaming mode"
- Command: `bun run ralph.ts "sleep 3" --no-stream --stalling-timeout 1s --stalling-action stop`

**Status:** COMPLETED
title: Fix stalling detection in non-streaming mode

close_reason: Agent rotation and blacklist implemented. Blacklist persisted in state. Tests passing.
description:
## Implementation Details

**File:** `ralph.ts` (lines 2331-2355, 2413-2437)

**What was implemented:**
- Blacklist current agent when stalling detected (with rotate action)
- Store blacklist in state with expiry timestamp
- Advance to next agent in rotation
- Skip blacklisted agents when selecting next agent (lines 2210-2237)
- Clear all blacklists if all agents are blacklisted (prevent deadlock, lines 2238-2249)
- Blacklist persisted in state file (.ralph/ralph-loop.state.json)

**Configuration:**
- `--blacklist-duration` flag (default 8 hours)
- Supports human-readable format: 1h, 30m, 8h, etc.

**Verification:**
- Test: `tests/stalling-detection.test.ts` - "rotates to next agent on stalling"
- Test: `tests/stalling-detection.test.ts` - "blacklists stalled agent"
- Command: `bun run ralph.ts "sleep 10" --rotation "opencode:claude-sonnet-4,claude-code:gpt-4o" --stalling-action rotate --stalling-timeout 2s --blacklist-duration 10s`

**Status:** COMPLETED
title: Implement agent rotation and blacklist on stalling

close_reason: 10 comprehensive tests written. All tests spawn real processes and verify stalling detection. 10/10 passing.
description:
## Test Implementation

**File:** `tests/stalling-detection.test.ts`

**Tests implemented (10 total):**
1. Detects stalling in streaming mode with stop action
2. Detects stalling in streaming mode with rotate action
3. Detects stalling in non-streaming mode
4. Verifies stalling timeout is configurable
5. Verifies blacklist duration is configurable
6. Verifies stalling action is configurable (stop/rotate)
7. Verifies blacklist persisted in state
8. Verifies stalling events recorded in history
9. Verifies heartbeat shows elapsed and last activity time
10. Verifies early exit when stalling detected

**Test Characteristics:**
- Tests spawn REAL ralph processes (not mocked)
- Tests use `sleep` commands that actually stall
- Tests use short timeouts (1-3 seconds) for fast execution
- Tests verify early exit (process terminates before command completes)
- Tests verify output contains "stall" messages
- Tests verify state/history files

**Test Results:**
- 10/10 tests passing
- 30 expect() calls
- 25.51s runtime

**Verification:**
```bash
cd /home/bhd/Documents/Projects/bhd/open-ralph-wiggum-wt-bd-stalling-detection
bun test tests/stalling-detection.test.ts
```

**Status:** COMPLETED
title: Write comprehensive tests for stalling detection
